methods.name: computeBounds
methods.description: Calculate the bounding box of the child geometry of this component. Returns a named tuple consisting of (min, max, center, size). Each component in turn is another named tuple with (x, y, z). *display - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only SOP and POP operators whose display flag are turned on are included in the calculation. Furthermore, if the SOP or POP is contained within a child Geometry Component, that operator must have its display flag turned on as well. *render - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only SOP and POP operators whose render flag set are included in the calculation. Furthermore, if the SOP is contained within a child Geometry Component, that operator must have its render flag set as well. *selected - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only child components that are currently selected are included in the calculation. *recurse - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, child components are included in the calculation.

methods.name: bounds
methods.returns: Tuple[Tuple[float, float, float], Tuple[float, float, float], Tuple[float, float, float], Tuple[float, float, float]]
methods.description: Calculate the bounding box of the child geometry of this component. Note: This method is identical to the deprecated computeBounds method except that the display and render keywords now default to False. Returns a named tuple consisting of (min, max, center, size). Each component in turn is another named tuple with (x, y, z). *display - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only SOP and POP operators whose display flag are turned on are included in the calculation. Furthermore, if the SOP or POP is contained within a child Geometry Component, that operator must have its display flag turned on as well. *render - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only SOP and POP operators whose render flag set are included in the calculation. Furthermore, if the SOP or POP is contained within a child Geometry Component, that operator must have its render flag set as well. *selected - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only child components that are currently selected are included in the calculation. *recurse - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, child components are included in the calculation.
